name: nest-native-cache-workspace
description: Workspace for @stalefree/core (framework-agnostic tag-based cache invalidation through your database) and @nest-native/cache (the NestJS adapter)

scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @stalefree/core && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test:cov: c8 --all --include "packages/core/**/*.ts" --exclude "packages/core/test/**" --exclude "packages/core/index.ts" --exclude "packages/core/**/index.ts" --exclude "packages/core/interfaces.ts" --exclude "**/*.d.ts" --exclude "**/dist/**" --reporter text --reporter text-summary --reporter json-summary --reporter lcov --check-coverage --branches 100 --functions 100 --lines 100 --statements 100 npm run test:report
scripts.release:check: npm run release:check:readme-links && npm run release:check:sample-versions && npm run release:check:pack && npm run release:check:consumer
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run test:cov && npm run test:nestjs && npm run complexity:check && npm run complexity:report && npm run release:check && npm run security:audit
scripts.test:full: npm run test && STALEFREE_POSTGRES_URL=postgres://stalefree:stalefree@127.0.0.1:54331/stalefree STALEFREE_MYSQL_URL=mysql://stalefree:stalefree@127.0.0.1:33071/stalefree npm run test:integration
scripts.test:mutant:full: npm run test:mutant && STALEFREE_POSTGRES_URL=postgres://stalefree:stalefree@127.0.0.1:54331/stalefree STALEFREE_MYSQL_URL=mysql://stalefree:stalefree@127.0.0.1:33071/stalefree npm run test:integration:mutant
